name: 250g Bag of Whole Bean Coffee
description:
If you're looking for a small bag of whole bean coffee to jump into the world of flavours offered by Cafree, you're in the right place: this smaller, 250g bag of whole bean coffee is perfect for a first-time buyer or as a little top-up.

Our coffee is ethically sourced from sustainable farms around the world before it's roasted by us, right here in the UK. This makes sure the coffee is at its optimum freshness by the time it reaches your door, so you can be certain you're drinking it at its best.

Be spoiled for choice when choosing between fourteen special blends, ranging from our own chocolatey signature House Blend to our bittersweet Dark Blend and even our smoky French and Italian Roast Blends. We have a blend for every occasion: fancy a mocha, espresso or even pumpkin spice brew? We've got you covered.

Our in-house master roasters work tirelessly to ensure each bean tastes exactly how it should. When you open a bag of our speciality-grade coffee you know you're getting something capable of a café-worthy brew, every time. And when you're done, don't worry about waste - the bag itself is made from 100% recyclable material.

We will never charge over the odds for our coffee - you're always getting the best prices available when you shop with us. Be sure to check out all our blends to see if your favourites are reduced in price or have subscription discounts to make the most of our offerings and get the best deals.

name: Cold Brew Concentrate - 10 Servings
description:
Make delicious coffee in seconds when you pick up 10 servings of our Cold Brew Concentrate. If you want exceptional flavour with little-to-no effort, this product is for you.

To make our concentrate, we slow-steep our speciality-grade coffee in cold water for hours to extract all those gorgeous natural flavours from our ethically sourced beans. The result is a silky smooth, barista-quality base for all your coffee needs - not just iced coffees but hot lattes too, made in seconds. Mix in milk or water in a 1:1 ratio with the concentrate for a perfect coffee.

Be spoiled for choice when choosing between four special blends, ranging from our own chocolatey signature House Blend to our bittersweet Dark Blend: we've got you covered. When you're done, don't worry about waste - the carton itself is made from 100% recyclable material.

Each 300ml carton is capable of producing up to 5 delicious coffees, and you're getting two of them in this pack.

name: Small Cafetière
description:
This French Press (known colloquially as a Cafetière) is the perfect way to extract the most from the delicious coffee roasted by us at Cafree.

This cafetière has a modern and minimal design, meaning it can easily be tucked away in the cupboard out of sight when not in use, or left out on your kitchen countertop if you feel one of the four available colour options fits your aesthetic.

With a 600ml capacity, our smaller cafetière is capable of holding enough coffee for 2-3 standard mugs. The stainless steel surround ensures your coffee retains its temperature, so you can come back later for your next cup without worrying about it being cold. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Use exclusively coarsely-ground coffee, stir it with hot water and let it brew before pressing - this will result in the best extraction of flavour from the grind, producing the best coffee.

name: Large Cafetière
description:
This French Press (known colloquially as a Cafetière) is the perfect way to extract the most from the delicious coffee roasted by us at Cafree.

This cafetière has a modern and minimal design, meaning it can easily be tucked away in the cupboard out of sight when not in use, or left out on your kitchen countertop if you feel one of the four available colour options fits your aesthetic.

With a 1000ml capacity, our larger cafetière is capable of holding enough coffee for 4-5 standard mugs. The stainless steel surround ensures your coffee retains its temperature, so you can come back later for your next cup without worrying about it being cold. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Use exclusively coarsely-ground coffee, stir it with hot water and let it brew before pressing - this will result in the best extraction of flavour from the grind, producing the best coffee.

name: Pour-Over Coffee Dripper
description:
One of the world's most popular methods for brewing coffee, especially among professional baristas, the pour-over method is performed by pouring hot water into your favourite coffee grounds, held in a filter within our dripper.

Our professional-level, high-quality dripper is made from porcelain, enabling optimal heat retention in a way that plastic drippers can't. The V-shaped design allows for the best flow rate - this facilitates the removal of unwanted sediment from your grounds while allowing natural coffee oils to pass through, resulting in a balanced body and flavor. Experiment a little with your pour method and see what creates the best taste and texture for you.

The best part? It's simple to use and easy to clean. If you're looking to brew barista-quality coffee from the comfort of your own home, this product is perfect for you.

Pair with our Flat Bottom Paper Coffee Filters and your favourite blend(s) of Cafree's Ground Coffee.

name: Moka Pot Hob Coffee Maker
description:
An older method of brewing your coffee, a moka pot allows you to create both thick espresso-style coffees and longer filter-style ones. You won't need to use paper filters with one of these!

Our moka pot is made from stainless steel and has a traditional design, optimising heat retention in the device thus ensuring your coffee retains its temperature, so you can come back later for your next cup without worrying about it being cold. It is capable of holding enough coffee for 4-5 espresso cups or 1-2 standard mugs. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Fill the bottom with water and fill the included filter with your favourite blend of coarsely-ground coffee. Place the filter basket into the bottom chamber above the water, and screw the top of the moka pot to the base. Put the pot on a hob at a medium heat and wait for all the water to pass through the coffee and into the upper chamber, before pouring into your favourite cup - simple and effective.

name: Ceramic Teapot
description:
Crafted from high-quality ceramic, this teapot retains heat beautifully, helping your tea brew evenly and stay warmer for longer. Its smooth, glazed finish is both elegant and durable, and with its classic silhouette and three colour offerings, it makes a timeless addition to any kitchen or table setting.

The shape of the spout ensures a clean, drip-free pour, and the comfortable handle offers a secure grip while serving. This teapot comes with a fine, removable, rust-resistant stainless steel infuser which allows compatibility with both loose leaf tea and tea bags. Because the materials used are food-safe and inert, the teapot preserves the true flavour of your tea. With a 750ml capacity, this teapot can hold enough tea for 2-3 delicious, aromatic cups. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Durable, convenient to use, and effortlessly stylish, if you're looking for a simple way to enjoy your favourite tea, this is the perfect way to enjoy it.

name: Cast Iron Teapot
description:
This beautiful Asian-inspired teapot resembles the classic 'Tetsubin' design; an integral part of Japanese tea culture. Crafted from a stylish, sturdy cast iron exterior and enamelled interior, this teapot retains heat beautifully, helping your tea brew evenly and stay warmer for longer, and looks beautiful on display in any kitchen.

The shape of the spout ensures a clean, drip-free pour, and the comfortable handle offers a secure grip while serving. This teapot comes with a fine, stainless steel infuser which allows compatibility with both loose leaf tea and tea bags. Because the materials used are food-safe and inert, the teapot preserves the true flavour of your tea. With a 750ml capacity, this teapot can hold enough tea for 2-3 delicious, aromatic cups. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Durable, convenient to use, and effortlessly stylish, if you're looking for a simple way to enjoy your favourite tea, this is the perfect way to enjoy it.

name: Glass Teapot
description:
This stunning glass teapot has a simple yet modern design. Crafted from borosilicate glass, a specialised type of glass renowned for its heat resistance and durability, this teapot looks beautiful on display in any kitchen, and because it's glass, you'll always know when to prepare the next pot.

The shape of the spout ensures a clean, drip-free pour, and the comfortable handle offers a secure grip while serving. This teapot comes with a fine, stainless steel infuser which allows compatibility with both loose leaf tea and tea bags. Glass is food-safe and inert; the teapot preserves the true flavour of your tea, however it does not retain heat as well as our ceramic and cast iron teapot offerings. With a 750ml capacity, this teapot can hold enough tea for 2-3 delicious, aromatic cups. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Durable, convenient to use, and effortlessly stylish, if you're looking for a simple way to enjoy your favourite tea, this is the perfect way to enjoy it.

name: Small Cold Brew Bottle
description:
Cold brewing your coffee and tea uses time instead of heat in order to carefully and gently extract all the natural flavours and aromas from your favourite ground coffee or loose tea leaves. The resulting brew will taste so good, you won't regret the wait.

The bottle itself is made from borosilicate glass, a specialised type of glass renowned for its durability, and it comes with its own integrated filter to hold the grounds or loose tea leaves, and a silicone stopper. With a 600ml capacity, this is our smaller cold brew bottle on offer, and can hold enough coffee or tea for 2-3 cups. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

We recommend you allow at least 8 hours brewing time for a great tasting brew, but the longer you leave it, the more intense the flavours will be. Preparing your cold brew the night before is the best way to enjoy the perfect drink the following morning.

name: Large Cold Brew Bottle
description:
Cold brewing your coffee and tea uses time instead of heat in order to carefully and gently extract all the natural flavours and aromas from your favourite ground coffee or loose tea leaves. The resulting brew will taste so good, you won't regret the wait.

The bottle itself is made from borosilicate glass, a specialised type of glass renowned for its durability, and it comes with its own integrated filter to hold the grounds or loose tea leaves, and a silicone stopper. With a 1000ml capacity, this is our larger cold brew bottle on offer, and can hold enough coffee or tea for 4-5 cups. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

We recommend you allow at least 8 hours brewing time for a great tasting brew, but the longer you leave it, the more intense the flavours will be. Preparing your cold brew the night before is the best way to enjoy the perfect drink the following morning.

name: Automatic Cold Brew Maker
description:
Fancy a cold brew but don't want to wait the recommended 8-24 hours with a traditional bottle? This instant Automatic Cold Brew Maker can deliver the same delicious, smooth, quality cold brew in under 20 minutes. Enjoy serious flavour without the dilution from ice, with options to adjust the strength of your brew using your favourite ground coffee or loose tea leaves.

The sleek, modern, stylish design makes the device a perfect addition to any kitchen setup. The transparent water tank is crafted from borosilicate glass and is removable for efficient cleaning - it is also dishwasher safe. With a 1000ml capacity, the tank can hold enough cold brew for 4-5 cups. A convenient LCD display on the front of the device provides information on the remaining brew time, and selected strength of your brew.

name: Essential Espresso Coffee Machine
description:
The Essential Espresso Coffee Machine is the perfect starting point for great espresso coffee at home. Designed for simplicity and convenience, it delivers rich, satisfying espresso at the touch of a button, with no experience required.

Inspired by traditional Italian espresso machines, its polished chrome exterior plating gives it a stylish look, and its compact footprint makes it ideal for smaller kitchens, offices, or anywhere space is at a premium. With a 600ml capacity, the tank can hold enough water for 12-18 espresso cups or 2-3 standard cups at a time.

Just fill the tank with water, insert a pod, press brew, and enjoy a consistently smooth cup in seconds. With minimal setup and easy cleaning, it’s a fuss-free way to enjoy café-style coffee whenever you want it. If you’re new to pod machines or want reliable coffee without the extras, the Essential delivers exactly what you need.

**Key features:**

- One-touch brewing for effortless espresso
- Compact, space-saving design
- Fast heat-up time
- Easy-clean components
- Ideal for beginners and everyday use

name: Deluxe Espresso Coffee Machine
description:
Step up your coffee experience with the Deluxe Espresso Coffee Machine, designed for those who want a little more from every cup than our Essential offering. Combining ease of use with enhanced performance, it brings greater control and richer flavour to your daily brew.

Inspired by traditional Italian espresso machines, its polished chrome exterior plating gives it a stylish look, and its compact footprint makes it ideal for smaller kitchens, offices, or anywhere space is at a premium. With a built-in adjustable drip-tray for small and large cup sizes and improved pressure extraction, the Deluxe model lets you fine-tune your espresso to suit your taste. A larger water tank is also included; the 1000ml capacity tank can hold enough water for 20-30 espresso cups or 4-5 standard cups at a time.

Stylish, versatile, and reliable, the Deluxe strikes the perfect balance between convenience and customisation. Just fill the tank with water, insert a pod, press brew, and enjoy a consistently smooth cup in seconds. With minimal setup and easy cleaning, it’s a fuss-free way to enjoy café-style coffee whenever you want it. For individuals new to pod machines and connoisseurs alike, the Deluxe delivers exactly what you need.

**Key features:**

- One-touch brewing for effortless espresso
- Compact, space-saving design
- Fast heat-up time
- Easy-clean components
- Adjustable drip-tray for both small and large cups
- Water level gauge
- Descale warning feature
- Enhanced pressure for fuller flavour extraction
- Larger water tank for fewer refills
- Sleek, modern design
- Easy operation with added flexibility

name: Professional Espresso Coffee Machine
description:
For those who take their coffee seriously, the Professional Espresso Coffee Machine delivers exceptional performance and uncompromising quality. Our top-of-the-line offering has all the features you could ever want in order to create the best brew.

Built with premium materials and advanced brewing technology, it offers precise temperature control and high-pressure extraction to ensure consistent results for every cup. Inspired by traditional Italian espresso machines, its polished chrome exterior plating gives it a stylish look, and its compact footprint makes it ideal for smaller kitchens, offices, or anywhere space is at a premium. Complete with a water level gauge, descale warning feature, and built-in adjustable drip-tray for small and large cup sizes, the Deluxe model lets you fine-tune your espresso to suit your taste. A larger water tank is also included; the 1500ml capacity tank can hold enough water for 30-45 espresso cups or 6-8 standard cups at a time.

Whether you prefer a short, intense espresso or a longer, smoother brew, this machine gives you complete control over your coffee experience. Designed to impress both in performance and appearance, the Professional model is ideal for dedicated home baristas or office environments where quality matters. It’s the pinnacle of pod-based espresso: refined, powerful, and effortless.

**Key features:**

- One-touch brewing for effortless espresso
- Compact, space-saving design
- Fast heat-up time
- Easy-clean components
- Adjustable drip-tray for both small and large cups
- Water level gauge
- Descale warning feature
- Enhanced pressure and temperature control for fuller flavour extraction
- Large capacity for high-use environments
- Sleek, modern design
- Premium construction for durability and style
- Easy operation with added flexibility
- Customisable brew settings
- Consistent, barista-quality espresso

name: Manual Burr Coffee Grinder
description:
This grinder is ideal for coffee lovers who enjoy a more hands-on brewing ritual. Using precision burrs instead of blades, it produces a consistent grind that helps preserve the full flavour of your beans. With no need for electricity, it’s perfect for travel, camping, or kitchens where counter space is limited.

To use, simply turn the handle, and enjoy freshly ground coffee whenever you want it, in seconds. Durable, compact, and quiet, it’s a simple way to take full control of your brew. With multiple grind settings from fine to coarse, you're able to repeatedly produce the perfect grind for your brewing method of choice. It's also easy to take apart for easy cleaning, and both the hopper and grind reservoir are dishwasher safe.

name: Automatic Burr Coffee Grinder
description:
This automatic grinder combines convenience with consistency, delivering café-quality grounds effortlessly without you even needing to be in the room. Its burr grinding system ensures uniform particle size, helping you preserve the nuanced flavour in your favourite beans and reliable results across every brew.

It's incredibly easy to use: just place the beans in the hopper at the top of the device, select how coarse you want the grind to be, press start and let the grinder do the work. Designed for everyday use, it’s the perfect choice for busy mornings or anyone who wants precision without the effort. It's also easy to take apart for easy cleaning, and both the hopper and grind reservoir are dishwasher safe.

name: Blade Coffee Grinder
description:
While not as consistent as a burr grinder, this blade grinder is a straightforward solution for grinding coffee beans quickly and easily. Using rotating blades, it chops beans into grounds suitable for everyday brewing. It’s compact, affordable, and easy to use, making it a great entry point for new coffee drinkers or those who want a simple, no-frills option.

Just add beans and turn the handle until the beans are ground to your preference. It's also easy to take apart for easy cleaning, and both the hopper and grind reservoir are dishwasher safe.

name: Handheld Electric Milk Frother
description:
This simple-yet-effective manual milk frother uses a hand-pumped, mesh-screen plunger inside a container in order to force air into milk, creating thick foam. As there's no need for electricity, it’s perfect for making barista-level coffees on the go, or in kitchens where counter space is limited. Its combination of stylish and simple design alongside its robust build materials make it a perfect everyday tool for people who love coffee.

Adding frothed milk to a coffee enhances its texture and flavour by creating a creamy, velvety, and sweet foam. The process of frothing adds heat and air to the milk, which breaks down proteins, releases natural sweetness, and creates a dense, luxurious texture that complements the brew.

Works best with pre-heated milk.

name: Standing Electric Milk Frother
description:
A more professional approach to making the perfect frothed milk to add to your favourite coffees, this standing electric milk frother is made from polished stainless steel for a low-profile, sleek and modern design that looks great in any kitchen. There's no need to pre-heat your milk; this device can produce both hot and cold foam, or just hot milk - just select which option you need on the device.

Adding frothed milk to a coffee enhances its texture and flavour by creating a creamy, velvety, and sweet foam. The process of frothing adds heat and air to the milk, which breaks down proteins, releases natural sweetness, and creates a dense, luxurious texture that complements the brew.

name: Ceramic Mug
description: After finding your favourite blends to drink, you certainly need something to drink them from. We've got you covered with our own brand mugs. Made from ceramic, this mug does a fantastic job preserving the temperature and flavour of your beverages, so you can enjoy your favourite drinks for longer.

name: Ceramic Mug -  Set of 4
description: Grab a pack of four of our branded mugs. name: Glass Mug
description: Extremely stylish and modern, this mug is made from borosilicate glass, a specialised type of glass renowned for its heat resistance and durability. It'll do a fantastic job preserving the temperature and flavour of your beverages, so you can enjoy your favourite drinks for longer.

name: Glass Mug - Set of 4
description: Pick up a pack of four of our stylish and modern borosilicate glass mugs. They're heat resistant and durable, and will look great on your coffee table. They're great at preserving the temperature and flavour of your beverages, so you can enjoy your favourite drinks for longer. A perfect product for someone looking to share the experience of drinking great coffee and tea with friends and family.

description:

With its smooth glaze and classic shape, it’s designed to sit comfortably in your hand while you drink, and suits any kitchen or table setting.

Built for everyday use, it’s both microwave and dishwasher safe. Pair it with your favourite tea from Cafree and enjoy a delicious, aromatic brew, whenever you like.

name: Ceramic Teacup - Set of 4
description:

name: Small Insulated Tumbler
description:
The smaller of our two offerings, this tumbler is perfect for those who like to savour their coffee over a longer period of time without it going cold, and people who prefer their drinks on the go. Made from stainless steel and with double-wall vacuum insulation, your drinks will maintain their temperature as long as you need them to, down to the last sip.

The clip-shut lid prevents any spills and is easily taken apart for convenient cleaning. The entire tumbler is also dishwasher safe, so you don't need to worry about cleaning after a long day away from home. Available in 8 colours, there's sure to be a tumbler that fits your style.

Our smaller tumbler can hold 300ml of liquid.

name: Large Insulated Tumbler
description:
The larger of our two offerings, this tumbler is perfect for those who like to savour their coffee over a longer period of time without it going cold, and people who prefer their drinks on the go. Made from stainless steel and with double-wall vacuum insulation, your drinks will maintain their temperature as long as you need them to, down to the last sip. Perfect for picnics, long hikes, or just a normal day at the office.

The clip-shut lid prevents any spills and is easily taken apart for convenient cleaning. The entire tumbler is also dishwasher safe, so you don't need to worry about cleaning after a long day away from home. Available in 8 colours, there's sure to be a tumbler that fits your style.

Our larger tumbler can hold 600ml of liquid.

name: 100 Flat Bottom Paper Coffee Filters
description:
Looking to start making your own pour-over coffee, or after a little top-up? Our premium flat bottom paper coffee filters are oxygen-bleached (TCF) to that ensure a clean cup of coffee with no papery taste, no residue, and all its original flavours and aromas preserved. Designed for almost all our manual filter coffee equipment, they excel at removing fine particles and oils. The flat bottom of the filter enables slower, more evenly-distributed water flow, resulting in a fuller-bodied, sweeter brew.

Our filters are always biodegradable, so you can use them in an eco-friendly way by composting them at home. Place the filter on top of our Pour-Over Coffee Dripper and fill with your favourite Cafree Ground Coffee. Pour boiling water over the top of the grounds to extract all the flavours and aromas for a delicious brew with almost no effort required.

This pack contains 100 filters.

description:

name: Coffee Maker Descaler
description:
This descaler removes damaging internal scale from coffee machines. It is created using an odour-free, biodegradable formula with both lactic and citric acid for safe cleaning, without leaving a nasty taste in your devices.

To use, mix 1 part descaler with 10 parts water and leave the resulting solution to work for 10 minutes before rinsing away or flushing through the system when used for espresso machines. There is no scrubbing required.

This bottle contains 500ml.

This product can cause serious eye irritation. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Keep out of reach of children. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Wash thoroughly after handling. Always read and follow the information on the product label.

name: 200g Pack of Coffee Grinder Cleaning Pellets
description:
These pellets are a natural, food-safe solution designed to clean internal grinder blades by effectively removing residual coffee oils and residue. Cleaning your grinders semi-regularly helps maintain the proper flavours and aromas of your beans. When used with our own grinders, there's no need to dismantle the device for cleaning; simply grind these pellets through the device like you would with coffee beans.

A typical thorough clean requires 15g. This 200g pack contains enough pellets for approximately 13 uses.

description: Level up your iced coffee and tea game with our ice cube tray. Made from 100% silicone, ice cubes are easy to remove. This tray has the capacity for 12 large 30x30mm ice cubes, each featuring the Cafree logo. This product is dishwasher safe.

name: Airtight Coffee Jar - Set of 3
description:
Keep your coffee fresher for longer with a set of 3 of our Airtight Coffee Jars. Pump the larger button on the lid to remove excess air in the jar and the smaller button to release the vacuum effortlessly. Made from borosilicate glass, they are both durable and inert, which will preserve the flavours and aromas of your coffee, and are perfect for both beans and ground coffee. Remember to keep your coffee cool and dry so it stays tasting its best. Their stylish design means they'll look great in any kitchen setting, and they are designed for everyday use.

With each jar having a 250g capacity, it’s ideal for your favourite coffee beans and grounds, and for those who like to buy their coffee in bulk and want it to maintain its taste from the first cup to the last. The glass jar itself is also dishwasher safe, for easy cleaning.
